hero.title: Beautiful Flowcharts,
hero.subtitle: Built for Developers
hero.description: Create stunning flowcharts with code or canvas. Export to any format. Open source and free forever.
hero.description4: 100% free, open-source diagram tool for builders. Write code or drag and drop — get beautiful results either way.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.description: Traditional flowchart tools are either too complex or too limited.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.description: OpenFlowKit combines the best of both worlds.

demo.title: Simple for sketching.
demo.subtitle: Ready for production.
demo.description: Sketch your ideas fast. Export them production-ready.

cta.title: Ready to Start?
cta.subtitle: Create your first flowchart in seconds.

footer.madeWith: Made with ❤️ by the OpenFlowKit Team

home.startFromScratch: Start from scratch or import an existing diagram.

renameFlow.hint: Names are local to this browser profile unless you export or sync them elsewhere.

home.homeEmptySubtitle: Design enterprise-grade architectures instantly. Start from a blank canvas, describe your infrastructure with our AI builder, or use a tailored template.

deleteFlow.hint: This cannot be undone unless you have an exported backup or another copy.

welcome.title: OpenFlowKit
welcome.description: Design beautiful, structured diagrams with a developer-first canvas.
welcome.privacy: Your diagrams, API keys, and data stay locally on your device.
welcome.analytics: We collect basic anonymous usage and reliability data to improve the product. Never your diagram content, prompt text, file contents, or API keys.

features.localFirst: Local-first architecture keeps your data safe.

welcome.feature2Desc: Generate complete architectures with a single intelligent prompt.
welcome.feature3Desc: Instantly construct stunning visual infrastructure from text.
welcome.feature4Desc: Export into beautiful, fully animated presentation diagrams.
welcome.analyticsDesc: We collect diagnostic data. We never read your diagrams or prompts.

pricing.title: Premium features.
pricing.subtitle: Zero dollar price tag.
pricing.description: OpenFlowKit is 100% open source. There is no "Enterprise Edition" hidden behind a sales call.
pricing.fullAccess: Full access to the core engine.
pricing.hostAnywhere: Host it anywhere. Modify it freely.
pricing.noAccount: No account or credit card required

features.saveLocally: Save locally, your data stays on your device

cta.joinUs: Join us in building the next generation of visual tools. Open source, local-first, and forever free.

share.title: Share Design
share.description: Invite collaborators to view and edit this flow with you in real-time.
share.footerNote: Your diagram stays local unless you share this room. If copy is blocked, copy the link above manually.
share.permissionsNote: Anyone with the link can join.
share.permissionsNoteSecondary: Permission controls and durable backend sync are not configured yet.

toast.copyManual: Clipboard access is blocked. Copy the link manually from the share dialog.
toast.fallbackMode: Realtime sync is unavailable. Continuing in local-only mode.

realtime.title: Realtime sync active
realtime.body: Peers who open this link can see live updates and cursors over the current peer transport.

waiting.title: Connecting to realtime sync
waiting.body: This canvas is still trying to establish live peer sync. If it cannot, the session will stay local-only in this browser.

fallback.title: Local-only collaboration
fallback.body: Without a backend relay or supported peer transport, this session does not provide durable multi-user live sync outside the current browser runtime.

syncing.title: Local room cache syncing
syncing.body: This browser is still restoring any IndexedDB-cached room state before peer sync fully settles.

hydrated.title: Recovered from local cache
hydrated.body: This room already had locally cached state in this browser, so the canvas could restore before peers reconnected.

ready.title: Local cache ready
ready.body: This browser can keep a local IndexedDB copy of the room for reload and offline recovery in this device.

unavailable.title: No local room cache
unavailable.body: This collaboration session is not using browser IndexedDB room persistence right now.

problem.title: Why do diagrams
problem.subtitle: always feel like a chore?
problem.description: We're designing complex systems with tools built for arts and crafts.
problem.pixelPurgatoryDesc: Wasting hours aligning boxes by hand. One new service breaks your entire layout.
problem.screenshotTrapDesc: Docs drift the moment you take the screenshot. Static assets are dead assets.
problem.enterpriseBeigeDesc: Locked into rigid, generic templates. Your architecture is unique; your diagrams shouldn't look like clipart.

solution.title: Everything you need.
solution.subtitle: Nothing you don't.
solution.description: The ultimate white-label canvas. Fully customizable nodes, edges, and themes — powered by React Flow. It's your brand, given infinite space to breathe.
solution.diagramAsCodeDesc: First-class support for Mermaid.js and our type-safe DSL. Define your architecture in code, export as JSON, and let the engine handle the layout.
solution.flowpilotAIDesc: Chat with your diagram. "Make the corners rounder", "Add a load balancer".
solution.addRedisCache: Add a Redis cache in front of the DB.
solution.localPrivateDesc: We don't want your data. Everything stays on your machine. No cloud saves, no tracking, no "syncing" to our servers. You have full freedom.
solution.amazingAestheticsDesc: Break free from "Enterprise Beige". Fully customizable fonts, colors, and shapes. Create diagrams that look like art, not documentation.
solution.localizationDesc: Available in multiple languages including English, Turkish, German, French, Spanish, Chinese, and Japanese.

workflows.title: One engine.
workflows.subtitle: Three native workflows.
workflows.description: OpenFlowKit adapts to the tool you are already using. No new tabs to open. No context switching.
workflows.engineeringDesc: Write diagrams in our DSL or Mermaid.js syntax. Paste code, get a fully laid-out diagram. Export as JSON to version control.
workflows.designDesc: Stop rebuilding screens. Copy from the canvas and paste into Figma as editable SVG and text layers.
workflows.exportShareDesc: Export diagrams as SVG or PNG. Copy to clipboard and paste into Figma with editable layers. Save as JSON to share or version control.

figma.title: Copy the code.
figma.subtitle: Paste the design.
figma.description: Copy a diagram from OpenFlowKit and paste it straight into Figma — you'll get editable text and clean vector shapes, not a flat image. No plugins needed.

testimonials.title: Build in public.
testimonials.subtitle: Shape the engine.
testimonials.description: OpenFlowKit is just getting started. We are building the core engine in the open. Join us on Day 1.
testimonials.openSourceDesc: The core engine is MIT licensed. Read the source, submit PRs, or fork it for your internal tools.

errors.terraformHclRequiresAi: Terraform HCL requires AI analysis. Use the AI button.
errors.nativeNotAvailable: Native parsing not available for this type.

errors.inputExceedsLimit: Input exceeds {{max}} limit. Trim the content or use a smaller file.

strictModeGuidance.defineEndpoints: Define every edge endpoint as an explicit architecture node before connecting edges.
strictModeGuidance.uniqueIds: Use unique ids for each service/group/junction node (no duplicate architecture ids).
strictModeGuidance.edgeSyntax: Use architecture edge arrows `-->`, `<--`, or `<-->` and side qualifiers like `api:R --> L:db`.
strictModeGuidance.nodeSyntax: Use valid node declarations: `service id(icon)[Label]`, `group id[Label]`, `junction id[Label]`.
strictModeGuidance.fallback: Switch off Architecture Strict Mode to allow auto-recovery, or fix diagnostics and retry.

layout.title: Layout Studio
layout.hierarchicalDesc: Best default for most flows. Balanced readability and edge crossings.
layout.treeOptimizedDesc: Strict parent-child layout for org charts and dependency trees.
layout.orthogonalCompactDesc: Dense left-to-right structure for medium and high-density diagrams.
layout.orthogonalSpaciousDesc: Extra whitespace for clarity in presentations and reviews.

canvas.architectureStrictModeDesc: Block Mermaid import when architecture diagnostics include recovery/validation issues
canvas.routingProfileHint: Infrastructure mode biases orthogonal routes for service maps.
canvas.edgeBundlingDesc: Keep parallel connections on shared lanes
canvas.mermaidImportModeDesc: Controls how Mermaid diagrams are imported to the canvas.

mcpSettings.title: Connect AI tools (MCP)
mcpSettings.intro: Add the OpenFlowKit MCP server to Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, or any MCP client. Your assistant uses its own model to author diagrams, while OpenFlowKit supplies local validation, templates, icon lookup, codebase analysis, and viewer links.
mcpSettings.installNote: Requires Node 18+. No global install needed — npx fetches on demand.
mcpSettings.keysNote: No API keys needed. Your AI client already has the model; this server adds diagram-specific tools.
mcpSettings.toolsIntro: These are the capabilities your AI assistant gains. It picks one automatically based on your request.
mcpSettings.footerNote: Need to debug a connection or build a custom client?
mcpSettings.tryItIntro: Paste these into your AI assistant. The install prompt asks an agentic client (Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf) to write the config for you; the test prompt verifies the connection.
mcpSettings.installPromptHint: For Cursor / Claude Code / Windsurf agents

mcp.pageSubtitle: Give any MCP client first-class diagramming tools. Local-first, no API key.
mcp.visualAlt: Your AI client connects to the OpenFlowKit MCP server over stdio, which provides local diagramming tools.
